manifest.title: Borg Warehouse
manifest.author: Shaun Sundquist <support@bluepants.dev>
manifest.description:
Self-hosted web UI for managing BorgBackup repositories.

Borg Warehouse gives you a single place to provision Borg repos, control SSH access for clients, monitor backup status across all your machines, and receive alerts when backups fall behind or fail. Each repository is isolated under its own restricted SSH user.

Pairs naturally with Borg clients on your servers, workstations, or NAS devices.
manifest.changelog:
* Switched package versioning to Cloudron-compatible pkgsemver format.
* Updated packaging scripts and metadata for successful Cloudron build/publish.

SSH_SERVER_PORT.title: SSH Port
SSH_SERVER_PORT.description: SSH endpoint used by Borg clients
